title: Decoupled transform partitioning
abstract: Methods, apparatus, and computer readable storage medium for transform block partitioning in video decoding. The method includes receiving, by a device, a coded video bitstream for a luma block and a chroma block, the luma block being co-located with the chroma block. The device includes a memory storing instructions and a processor in communication with the memory. The method also includes partitioning, by the device, the luma block to obtain a luma coding block partitioning tree; partitioning, by the device, the chroma block to obtain a chroma coding block partitioning tree; partitioning, by the device, a luma coding block from the luma coding block partitioning tree to obtain a plurality of luma transform blocks; and partitioning, by the device, a chroma coding block from the chroma coding block partitioning tree to obtain at least one plurality of chroma transform blocks.
claims: 1. A method for video decoding, the method comprising: receiving, by a device comprising a memory storing instructions and a processor in communication with the memory, a coded video bitstream that includes a luma block and a chroma block, the luma block being co-located with the chroma block; generating a plurality of luma sub-blocks by partitioning, by the device, the luma block in accordance with a luma partitioning tree; generating a plurality of chroma sub-blocks by partitioning, by the device, the chroma block in accordance with a chroma partitioning tree; when the luma partitioning tree is different than the chroma partitioning tree and the chroma block has a corresponding directional intra prediction mode: parsing the coded video bitstream to identify a value of a luma transform parameter; generating a plurality of luma transform blocks by splitting, by the device, the plurality of luma sub-blocks in accordance with a luma transform unit splitting that is based on the value of the luma transform parameter; parsing the coded video bitstream to identify a value of a chroma transform parameter; and generating a plurality of chroma transform blocks by splitting, by the device, the plurality of chroma sub-blocks in accordance with a chroma transform unit splitting that is based on the value of the chroma transform parameter, wherein the luma transform unit splitting is different than the chroma transform unit splitting; and when the luma partitioning tree is different than the chroma partitioning tree and the chroma block has a corresponding non-directional intra prediction mode, prohibiting transform partitioning of the plurality of chroma sub-blocks.
